domestic: 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year (1 per calendar quarter).

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-08
10% cashback on dining, food delivery, and groceries is capped at Rs 1,000 per month combined, then reverts to the base 1.5% cashback rate.
Excludes fuel, rent, insurance, government, education, wallet loads, utilities, gold, and EMI transactions from earning cashback.
